origin_prompt: Develop a comprehensive DIY guide for constructing a height‑adjustable desk capable of supporting two 22‑inch monitors, a laptop, and additional accessories. Begin by gathering requirements, requesting the user to supply a photo of the intended workspace along with their budget range. Conduct thorough online research to identify affordable electric and manual lifting mechanisms, durable frame materials, and appropriate cable‑management solutions. Perform load and dimension calculations to determine the total weight, required motor torque for electric options, and an optimal desk height range. Compile a parts inventory in CSV format that lists every component—including frame sections, legs, motors, fasteners, wiring, and related items—accompanied by estimated costs. Create a visual design illustration that depicts the desk’s height range, load distribution, and a simple schematic diagram. Finally, assemble the research summary, calculations, parts list, and diagrams into a well‑formatted PDF guide. The final deliverables are a PDF guide, a CSV parts list, and a PNG plot of the design analysis.

full_tree.requirements: Obtain and document user‑provided workspace photo, equipment list, and budget range in a concise requirements summary

sub_tasks.requirements: User supplies a clear photo of the intended workspace and specifies a budget range
Requirements summary PDF containing workspace dimensions, monitor/laptop specs, and budget limits is produced

full_tree.requirements: Deliver a comparative analysis of affordable electric and manual lifting mechanisms, frame materials, and cable‑management solutions

sub_tasks.requirements: Table of at least three electric lifting mechanisms with cost, motor torque, power requirements, and installation complexity is generated
Table of at least three manual lifting mechanisms (e.g., screw‑jacks, pneumatic) with cost, effort rating, and installation steps is generated
Recommendation matrix matching frame material options (e.g., hardwood, aluminum, steel) to durability, cost, and ease of fabrication is produced
List of cable‑management accessories (clips, trays, sleeves) with pricing and compatibility notes is compiled

full_tree.requirements: Perform engineering calculations and produce a design illustration that validates load capacity, required motor torque, and height range

sub_tasks.requirements: Total static load (monitors, laptop, accessories) is calculated and documented in a load‑analysis report
Motor torque requirement for the selected electric mechanism is computed based on load and desired lift speed
Optimal desk height range (minimum, maximum) is determined and justified with ergonomic guidelines
PNG illustration showing desk height envelope, load distribution diagram, and schematic of the lifting mechanism is created

full_tree.requirements: Compile all research, calculations, parts list, and diagrams into the final deliverables: PDF guide, CSV parts inventory, and PNG design plot

sub_tasks.requirements: CSV file containing every component (frame sections, legs, motors, fasteners, wiring, accessories) with part numbers, quantities, and estimated costs is generated
Comprehensive PDF guide that includes requirements summary, research tables, calculation results, assembly instructions, safety tips, and the PNG illustration is produced
All files (PDF guide, CSV parts list, PNG plot) are packaged and made ready for delivery
